reply_original: Hi there, we're sorry to hear you feel this way. Could you share what specifically didn't meet your expectations? We're committed to improving and would love to understand your feedback. Please reach out to support@fantachat.ai for detailed assistance—we're here to help!
reply_zh: 你好，听到您感到这样我们感到抱歉。您能告诉我们具体哪些方面没有达到您的预期吗？我们致力于不断改进，并非常希望能了解您的反馈。如需详细帮助，请联系support@fantachat.ai—we're here to help!
